summary: List of OpenAccess view names to be processed as abstracts (LEF MACRO equivalent). Used in combination with init_oa_ref_lib and in the case where a Verilog netlist is read and views from the init_abstract_view list are used for on-demand loading for cells that were not processed from the libraries in the init_oa_ref_lib list. Used by the init_design command.
